resources.string: Iko kune yekucheka-kumucheto tekinoroji inosangana isina musono kuendesa kune yako yekupedzisira nyore.
Tumira kana kugashira mapasuru zvakachengeteka, munyika yese nesevhisi yedu yekutumira inokurumidza.
Mapasuru ako anobatwa zvine hungwaru uye anounzwa zvakachengeteka kunzvimbo yaanoenda.
Tumira kana kugashira mapasuru zvakachengeteka, munyika yese nesevhisi yedu yekutumira inokurumidza.
Tevera mapasuru ako munguva chaiyo uye ziva chaizvo paachasvika.
Isu tiri pano kuti tikubatsire iwe 24/7 nechero mibvunzo kana zvinokunetsa zvaungave nazvo.
Sarudza basa rako kuti uenderere mberi
Isa nharembozha yako uye tichakutumira mirairo yekuseta PIN yako patsva
Isu tinofanirwa kuongorora chitupa chako kuti tipedze kunyoresa
Tumira mapakeji munyika yose nekutumira kwakachengeteka
Tonga chimiro chako uye nhoroondo yekutumira
Unganidza mapaketi kubva panzvimbo ino yekiosk
Ona nzira yako yekutumira uye purogiramu
Gadziridza mamiriro ekutumira uye wedzera manotsi
Tonga profil yako yekutumira uye kuita
Zviyero zvese zvinofanirwa kunge zviri mumamilimita (mm)

Pasuru yako yagadziriswa.

Ndapota:
1. Tora risiti yako nebhakodhi label
2. Isa pasuru yako muLocker %d
3. Namira label yebhakodhi pasuru yako
4. Vhara dhoo rekukiya

Anogamuchira achaziviswa.
Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kukanzura? Zvose zvakaiswa data zvicharasika.
Mvumo yenzvimbo yarambwa. Haikwanisi kuwana nzvimbo yekutumira.
Kushandisa default nzvimbo. GPS chiratidzo haisi kuwanikwa.
Ndokumbira uise pasuru yako muLocker %d wovhara gonhi.
Network kukanganisa. Ndokumbira utarise kubatana kwako.
Ndokumbira uise OTP ine manhamba matanhatu
Kupinda kwakundikana. Ndokumbira utarise zvitupa zvako.
Nguva yako yapera. Ndapota pinda zvakare.
Isa magwaro ehunyanzvi kuti uwane maturusi ekuongorora
Ndokumbira uise kero yeemail inoshanda (semuenzaniso, user@example.com)
Ndokumbira uise chitupa cheNyika chiriko (Format: XX-XXXXXXX-X-XX)
Hatina kukwanisa kubatana mushure mekuedza kakawanda. Ndapota edza zvakare gare gare.
Skena pasuru bhakodhi kuti utange kudonhedza
Unganidza mapaketi kubva panzvimbo ino yekiosk
Ona nzira yako yekutumira uye purogiramu
Gadziridza mamiriro ekutumira uye wedzera manotsi
Tonga profil yako yekutumira uye kuita
Skena kana kuisa nhamba yekutevera pasuru:
Tumira mapakeji munyika yose nekutumira kwakachengeteka
Iwe une pasuru yakamirira yekuisa mulocker.
Tonga chimiro chako uye nhoroondo yekutumira
Bvisa cache, matanda, uye maneja data reapp
Isa nharembozha yako uye tichakutumira mirairo yekuseta PIN yako patsva
RS485 kutaurirana neanosvika mana STM32L412 mabhodhi (64 makiyi) kuburikidza neWinsen protocol @ 9600 baud
📋 Mirayiridzo: Dzvanya \'Trigger Scan\' wobva wanongedza scanner pabhakodhi uye dhonza bhiza remuviri. Mibairo inooneka pazasi nezvitambi zvenguva.

Mabhakodhi akaongororwa achaonekwa pano aine zvidhindo zvenguva...

Dzvanya 'Trigger Scan' kuti uvhure scanner.
Point scanner pabhakodhi uye dhonza physical trigger.
Mashoko ekubatanidza achaonekwa pano kana abatanidzwa
USB yekubatanidza uchishandisa Custom SpA Android API

Hardware Platform: Rockchip RK3399-all Android Box
Android Version: 7.1.2 (API Level 25)
Screen: 10.1" Portrait Orientation

Hardware Components:
• STM32L412 Locker Controllers (RS485)
• Honeywell0 Customer Xenon2) TG2480HIII Thermal Printer (USB)

Software Stack:
• Kotlin yeAndroid 7.1.2
• TypeScript inopindirana inopindirana
• MaAPI emugadziri akasarudzika
• maSerial communication library
Mvumo dzese dzinofanirwa kupihwa kiosk isati yatanga kushanda.
Isa kodhi ine manhamba matanhatu kubva pane yako SYS_ADMIN dashboard.
Pinda makodhi mapfupi makodhi kubva kuAdmin Portal (e.g. ZLK4X9M2).
Tinya \'Run All Tests\' kutanga network diagnostics...
Pakuseta kiosk iyi, tichashandisa gwaro rekubata nzvimbo sezvo pasina kamera iripo.
Gadzira makodhi ekutsigira uye gonesa rubatsiro rwekure
Dzvanya \'Tanga Session\' kuti ugone kubatsira kure.
Isa magwaro ehunyanzvi kuti uwane maturusi ekuongorora
Ndokumbira upe ruzivo rwako kune iyi nzira yekutumira.
Slide subtitle text inoenda pano netsananguro yakadzama yechinhu
Ndokumbira uise pasuru yako mukati uye uvhare musuwo zvakachengeteka.
Une odha isina kubhadharwa inoda kutarisirwa:\n\n
Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kukanzura odha iyi?\n\n
Mhosho: Package inodarika saizi yepamusoro yelocker!
Tatadza kutsvaga mitsara yelocker cell pahodha yakachengetwa.
Bvisa cache, matanda, uye maneja data reapp
Gonesa rubatsiro rwekure uye gadzira makodhi ekutsigira
Isa magwaro ehunyanzvi kuti uwane maturusi ekuongorora
PIN yazvino inofanira kuva manhamba matanhatu
PIN itsva inofanira kuva manhamba matanhatu
Tapota tarisa kana kuisa nhamba yekutevera
Pasuru yako yakakurisa kuti isakwana mune chero makiya edu pano. Ndokumbira ugadzirise zviyero zvako.
Mvumo yenzvimbo yarambwa. Haikwanisi kuwana nzvimbo yekutumira.
Kukanganisa kwenzvimbo. Kushandisa zvakagadzirirwa kiosk nzvimbo.
Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kukanzura? Zvose zvakaiswa data zvicharasika.
Izvi zvinoedza kuvhura ALL 16 makiyi. Kuenderera mberi?
Maintenance mode OFF - Kiosk ichavhara zvakare
Maintenance mode ON - Iwe unogona ikozvino kuwana iyo system
